evals.prompt: Create a new TypeScript project called my-api
evals.expected_output: Scaffolds a complete TS project with all config files
expectations: A directory called my-api is created
package.json exists with name set to my-api
package.json has type set to module

evals.prompt: Set up a TS starter with Jest and linting for a CLI tool
evals.expected_output: Triggers the skill and scaffolds the project, adapting for CLI context
expectations: The skill is triggered (not answered from general knowledge)
All config files are present in the output
The user is told about npm install as a next step

evals.prompt: I need a Node.js ESM project with TypeScript, testing, and formatting already set up
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a scaffold request and uses the skill
expectations: The skill is triggered by this phrasing
The path aliases #src/* and #modules/* are configured
Jest can run with the ESM preset
